/usr/bin/ar cr ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil-host.a  CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/cxx_memory.cxx.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/errors.cxx.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/bitset.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/c_q_rel.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/dso.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/file_util.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/flags.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/libelftc_dem_gnu3.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/libelftc_vstr.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/priority_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/quadsim.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/resource.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/mstack.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/tlog.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/tracing.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/util.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/vstring.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/vspec.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/vspec_parse.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/vspec_token.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/c_a_to_q.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/c_q_to_a.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/c_qtenscale.c.o CMakeFiles/comutil-host.dir/mips/c_qwmultu.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../../lib/mips/libcomutil-host.a
